methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Iran's war rhetoric and naval threats heighten border risk as Georgia tightens border movement and Iraq probes Israeli base
bullets: Netanyahu declared the Iran war 'not over' while Iran warned of retaliation against French and British warships in Hormuz, raising maritime security concerns for Turkey's southern flank
Georgia's security agency ordered temporary movement restrictions in border areas surrounding the Samtskhe‑Javakheti region, limiting cross‑border traffic
Iraqi parliament moved to summon the defence minister over claims of a secret Israeli base, signalling possible covert foreign military activity near Turkey's eastern border
regional_summary_6h.watch: Monitor Iranian naval posturing in Hormuz for spill‑over effects on Eastern Mediterranean shipping
